Teaching Iran to turn the Strait into a toll road was always a mistake.

Trump is in over his head to the detriment of the entire world.

The Senate cannot authorize an unprecedented $1.14 trillion in defense spending for Trump to continue his disastrous war at the expense of the American people.

I will vote no on the NDAA unless my amendment to end this illegal war is included.

Enough is enough.

Republicans spent this year blocking all attempts to add real, commonsense guardrails on DHS.

Now two people have been killed by ICE in less than a week—and no agents were wearing body cams. This has to stop.

Congress needs a steady vision to support Taiwan long-term, for both their security and our own.

I'm in Taiwan working to ensure our friendship stays strong, no matter who's in the White House.
